description: Hi! My name is Jeremy Boy. I am a senior creative technologist and scientist with 15 years of experience working at the intersection of research, analytics, product, policy and programme, focused on the benefits and trade-offs of data, advanced computational techniques and design when pplied to public policy, humanitarian action, and sustainable development. I am currently the lead data scientist of a global learning network on sustainable development priorities and challenges—the UNDP Accelerator Labs Network. My professional experience spans from data and AI thought leadership and strategy in the public sector  to team management,  to end-to-end visual analytics product development, to visual storytelling. I have an interdisciplinary background in graphic design and multi-media art, computer science, cognitive psychology, and science and technology studies.

title: What and How we Learned
description: Launch of the SDG Innovation Commons.

title: Artificial Intelligence for Collective Intelligence
description: Presentation of the framework and roadmap for AI4CI research and development.
